description: Processes uploaded slide decks as first-class governed technical artifacts. Produces structured intelligence including paper-ready prose candidates, extracted claims, assumptions, knowledge graph edges, gap detections, and exhibit recommendations to feed working-paper generation and cross-artifact reasoning.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models or envelope schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Working-paper section authoring beyond prose candidates — that belongs to the working-paper generator module
Comment resolution logic — that belongs to workflow_modules.comment_resolution
Storing domain allocation or regulatory data — that belongs to domain_modules
Lifecycle enforcement and governance — that belongs to the control_plane
LLM or embedding-based inference — all logic must remain deterministic heuristics
